status_legend.vanmoof: VanMoof application code — reconstruct to C
status_legend.fmna-deferred: Apple Find My (FMNA) — vendor, deferred (only VanMoof glue is vanmoof)
status_legend.vendor-zephyr: Zephyr RTOS kernel + Bluetooth host — vendor
status_legend.vendor-libc-sdk: libc / __aeabi_* / nrfx HAL / CC310 / arch — vendor

functions.note: toolchain branch veneer (thunk -> 0x000262b0)

functions.name: settings_parse_time_pubkey
functions.note: parses server response for time, settings_vm_public_key, settings_vm_bike_id

functions.name: findmy_handle_conn_rx
functions.note: routes BLE peer RX by slot to Find My message build/send or error

functions.name: findmy_conn_event_handler
functions.note: dispatches BLE conn events; serializes rssi/battery into Find My messages

functions.name: findmy_forward_peer_payload
functions.note: forwards peer payload chunk to Find My slot via message sender

functions.name: findmy_send_status_report
functions.note: builds and sends Find My status report message (cmd 0xc2)

functions.name: findmy_reset_conn_slots
functions.note: resets the three Find My connection slots (0x338-byte records)

functions.name: findmy_msg_enqueue
functions.note: builds 0x2f8-byte Find My message record and enqueues to send queue

functions.name: findmy_alloc_work_item
functions.note: allocates 0x10-byte work item, stamps default UUID/handler pointer

functions.name: findmy_match_provisioning_topic
functions.note: matches incoming MQTT topic against fmna provisioning topic table

functions.name: findmy_store_provisioning_token
functions.note: receives up to 16-byte provisioning token and stores it for fmna topic

functions.name: findmy_send_state_report
functions.note: serializes ready/enabled/uuid/pairing/provisioned Find My state and sends (cmd 0xe1)

functions.name: auth_adv_extra_field_enabled
functions.note: Reads three state flags; returns whether extra advertising field should be added

functions.name: auth_handle_connection_command
functions.note: Dispatches connection sub-commands (open/close/lock), sends BLE opcodes 0xe6/0xe9-0xeb

functions.name: auth_send_connection_state
functions.note: Builds connection/advertising state and sends BLE message opcode 0xe5

functions.name: auth_parse_certificate_challenge
functions.note: Decrypts/parses client certificate+challenge, validates fields, disconnects on failure

functions.name: fmna_handle_pairing_message
functions.note: Parses Apple Find My pairing message (fmna/pairing strings); defer as vendor

functions.name: auth_init_connection_table
functions.note: Zero-initializes per-connection state table (0xb8-byte entries) and list links

functions.name: auth_copy_pubkey_32
functions.note: Copies 32-byte public key/nonce from message into global auth buffer

functions.name: auth_copy_bike_id
functions.note: Copies up to 13-byte bike-id field into global auth buffer

functions.name: auth_submit_id_event
functions.note: Preps 13-byte id payload and enqueues auth event into framework queue

functions.name: auth_alloc_disconnect_event
functions.note: Allocates 0x18-byte auth event struct and sets its handler callback

functions.name: auth_alloc_connection_event
functions.note: Allocates 0x1c-byte connection event struct and sets its handler callback

functions.name: auth_check_connection_state
functions.note: Validates connection slot state; returns reason code 6 (challenge invalid)

functions.name: auth_format_ble_address
functions.note: Formats BLE address as %02X:..:%02X (type) with public/random label for logging

functions.name: auth_handle_disconnect
functions.note: Handles connection teardown, frees slot, posts disconnect event

functions.name: auth_handle_connect
functions.note: Handles new connection, registers GATT char 0xfc0e, posts connect event

functions.name: auth_init_connection_slots
functions.note: Initializes four 0x40-byte per-connection slots and their list links

functions.name: auth_send_disconnect_reason
functions.note: Sends auth-failure disconnect message with reason string (cert/signature/timeout)

functions.name: auth_alloc_event_0x14
functions.note: Allocates 0x14-byte auth event struct and sets its handler callback

functions.name: ble_connect_clear_adv_flag
functions.note: Clears advertising/notify state byte when BLE link-state check returns idle

functions.name: ble_connect_set_ready_flag
functions.note: Sets connect-ready state byte when BLE link-state check passes

functions.name: ble_send_signed_connect_payload
functions.note: Builds COSE/CBOR-signed connect payload and sends over secure channel

functions.name: ble_connect_state_machine
functions.note: Pairing/connect state machine dispatching on mode byte, triggers signed send + notify

functions.name: ble_advertise_bike_id_payload
functions.note: Copies and signs 32-byte bike_id payload then sends it

functions.name: ble_advertise_ecu_serial_payload
functions.note: Copies and signs 32-byte ecu_serial payload then sends it

functions.name: ble_secure_session_init
functions.note: Initializes VanMoof secure-channel session record around vendor TLS handshake

functions.name: settings_read_property_by_path
functions.note: Reads property by path key (ecu_serial, vm/pub_key, vm/bike_id) and emits value

functions.name: ble_char_write_value_26
functions.note: Length-checked characteristic write handler, buffers value and notifies

functions.name: ble_build_const_response_13
functions.note: Copies a constant 13-byte response template into output buffer

functions.name: ble_send_32byte_value
functions.note: Copies and notifies a 32-byte characteristic value (key/id)

functions.name: ble_char_write_value_13
functions.note: Length-checked 13-byte characteristic write handler, buffers and notifies

functions.name: ble_bike_id_present
functions.note: Predicate: returns 1 when the bike_id value buffer holds a non-zero first byte (bike id programmed); writes nothing (name corrected from ble_record_set_flag_byte)

functions.name: ble_build_connect_advert_payload
functions.note: Composes connect advert payload, sends bike_id or ecu_serial variant by flag

functions.name: ble_ftp_command_handler
functions.note: Handles ftp_command (size/index/data/crc/status) for firmware/flash transfer over BLE

functions.name: ble_message_dispatch_by_id
functions.note: Parses msgpack request and dispatches 16-bit command id to registered handler table

functions.name: spi_bridge_unlock
functions.note: Releases the SPI-bridge mutex (thin wrapper around vendor lock primitive)

functions.name: spi_bridge_consumer_thread
functions.note: SPI bridge consumer loop: 0x55AA-framed CRC16 packets, double-buffer, flash spill

functions.name: ble_msg_send
functions.note: Frames CRC16 packet into IPC slot and transmits message over comm queue

functions.name: ble_msg_tx_busy_get
functions.note: Returns transmit-in-flight/channel-busy flag guarding message sends

functions.name: ble_msg_tx_busy_clear
functions.note: Clears transmit-busy flag before queueing a new message

functions.name: ble_uicr_write_init_flag
functions.note: One-time provisioning: when the config word at 0x10001208 reads erased (0xFFFFFFFF), programs 4 bytes there via the flash controller's write op (name corrected from ble_msg_send_init_error)
